form.formComment: Last start broke when 10th (Fr5) over 1720m at this track, beaten 65 m by Bennie And The Jets (2:06.50) in NR 60 to 69 on March 28 at $3.30. Two runs back 9th (Sr1) over 1720m at this track well beaten by Tracy The Jet (2:04.90) in 3yo G3 No NR on August 16 at $41. Fitter and draws well so is a chance with manners.

Over raced throughout the middle stages.

form.formComment: Racing consistently. Last start on from midfield and won by a neck as favourite after showing early speed, (Fr2) at this track (2:06.00) beating Claudys Hero in 0W/15 0K stake on March 28 at $2.70 at the bell was 2nd-1.5. May be hard to beat again.

form.formComment: Two back was beaten by 6 m finishing fifth behind Bennie And The Jets at this track over 1720m in a NR 60 to 69 on March 28 at $13. Likely to be there at the business end.
